title: AI agents: the $0 marketing team that works 24/7
post:
I spent $0 on marketing last month.

Not because I'm cheap — because my AI agents handle it. LinkedIn outreach, cold emails, content scheduling, competitor analysis. All automated.

The key insight: most startup marketing is pattern-matching work. "Send this type of email to this type of prospect." AI is genuinely good at that.

My AI agents research prospects, personalize outreach, and follow up without me typing a word. They make mistakes, sure. But they learn fast.

For early-stage startups with no marketing budget, this is the unlock. You can now compete with companies 10x your size on distribution.

The team that figured this out first is going to run away with their market.

Are you using AI agents for growth? Thoughts?
